description: After you successfully execute a command, a DBot message appears in the War Room with the command details.

outputs.description: Unique identifier of the alert. Uptycs.Alert.agentType Type of agent associated with the alert (e.g., asset).
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.id

outputs.description: Alert identifier. Uptycs.Alert.alertRuleId Identifier of the alert rule that triggered this alert.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.alertId

outputs.description: Name of the alert rule that triggered this alert. Uptycs.Alert.alertStatusReasonId Identifier for the alert status reason.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.alertRuleName

outputs.description: Tags associated with the alert (e.g., MITRE ATT&CK techniques). Uptycs.Alert.alertTime Date
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.alertTags

outputs.description: Uptycs.Alert.alertTimeSuppresionDuration Duration of alert time suppression. Uptycs.Alert.alertTimeSuppresionStart
outputs.name: Timestamp when the alert was triggered.

outputs.description: Start time of alert time suppression. Uptycs.Alert.assetCityId City identifier of the asset.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: Number of CPU cores on the asset. Uptycs.Alert.assetCpuBrand CPU brand of the asset.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.assetCores

outputs.description: Description of the asset. Uptycs.Alert.assetDisabled Whether the asset is disabled.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.assetDescription

outputs.description: Gateway IP address of the asset. Uptycs.Alert.assetHardwareModel Hardware model of the asset.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.assetGateway

outputs.description: Hardware serial number of the asset. Uptycs.Alert.assetHardwareVendor Hardware vendor of the asset.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.assetHardwareSerial

outputs.description: Hostname of the asset associated with the alert. Uptycs.Alert.assetId Unique identifier of the asset.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.assetHostName

outputs.description: Date Timestamp of the asset's last activity. Uptycs.Alert.assetLastEnrolledAt
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.assetLastActivityAt

outputs.description: Timestamp when the asset was last enrolled. Uptycs.Alert.assetLatitude Latitude of the asset's location.
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: Whether the asset is currently live. Uptycs.Alert.assetLocation Geographic location of the asset.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.assetLive

outputs.description: Number of logical CPU cores on the asset. Uptycs.Alert.assetLongitude Longitude of the asset's location.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.assetLogicalCores

outputs.description: Whether the asset has manual Slack assignment. Uptycs.Alert.assetMemoryMb Memory in MB of the asset.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.assetManualSlackAssignment

outputs.description: Object group identifier of the asset. Uptycs.Alert.assetOs Operating system of the asset.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.assetObjectGroupId

outputs.description: OS flavor of the asset (e.g., debian). Uptycs.Alert.assetOsKey OS key identifier of the asset.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.assetOsFlavor

outputs.description: OS version of the asset. Uptycs.Alert.assetOsqueryVersion Osquery version installed on the asset.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.assetOsVersion

outputs.description: Slack user ID associated with the asset. Uptycs.Alert.assetStatus Status of the asset (e.g., active).
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.assetSlackUserId

outputs.description: User the alert is assigned to. Uptycs.Alert.attackType Type of attack associated with the alert.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.assignedTo

outputs.description: Cloud region code of the resource. Uptycs.Alert.cloudResourceId Cloud resource identifier.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.cloudRegionCode

outputs.description: Cloud tenant identifier. Uptycs.Alert.cloudType Cloud provider type.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.cloudTenantId

outputs.description: Alert code identifier. Uptycs.Alert.createdAt Date
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.code

outputs.description: Uptycs.Alert.custom Whether this is a custom alert rule. Uptycs.Alert.customerId
outputs.name: Timestamp when the alert was created.

outputs.description: Customer identifier. Uptycs.Alert.description Description of the alert.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: Display name of the alert. Uptycs.Alert.eventId Event identifier associated with the alert.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.displayName

outputs.description: Exception metadata containing detailed event information. Uptycs.Alert.groupId Group identifier.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.exceptionMetadata

outputs.description: Group name. Uptycs.Alert.grouping Alert grouping category (e.g., ATTACK).
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.groupName

outputs.description: Second-level grouping (e.g., MITRE tactic). Uptycs.Alert.groupingL3 Third-level grouping (e.g., MITRE technique).
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.groupingL2

outputs.description: Fourth-level grouping. Uptycs.Alert.hashKey Hash key of the alert.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.groupingL4

outputs.description: Whether the alert is related to a container. Uptycs.Alert.isTask Whether the alert is a task.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.isContainer

outputs.description: Key field of the alert. Uptycs.Alert.lastActiveAt Date
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.key

outputs.description: Uptycs.Alert.lastOccurredAt Date Timestamp when the alert last occurred.
outputs.name: Timestamp when the alert was last active.

outputs.description: Alert metadata containing detailed event information.
outputs.name: Uptycs.Alert.metadata
